summary: Cleanup PR for grmaterial and itmaterial. It replaces magic rendermode bitmasks with named render flags, removes a grmaterial data-section padding/string hack by modeling template fields and using inline literals/macros, adjusts grmaterial header prototypes, and performs a small local variable rename in item material TEV setup.

key_files.role: Main grmaterial cleanup: typed template fields replace padding, data hack removed, assert/report macros and inline strings restored, ItCmd placement adjusted for sdata ordering.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/grmaterial.c added 41 deleted 28 hunks 8
pr_body: Remove grmaterial data hack; Fix grmaterial sdata ordering
diff: struct grMaterial_MObjInfo pad_x50/library_name replaced with HSD_TevDesc tevdesc_tmpl and HSD_TECnst texp_tmpl
diff: data_section_pad removed and grMaterial_804D456C moved later
diff: __assert/OSReport base-offset string uses replaced with HSD_ASSERT and inline OSReport strings

key_files.role: Header cleanup: removes static/internal declarations from the public header, fixes a known return type, and exposes needed prototypes.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/grmaterial.h added 3 deleted 6 hunks 2
diff: removed static prototypes for grMaterial_801C897C, grMaterial_801C8E74, fn_801C8EF8
diff: grMaterial_801C8CDC changed from UNK_RET to void
diff: grMaterial_801C8E48 declared bool without static and grMaterial_801C9490 added with parameter names

key_files.role: Item material cleanup: uses named rendermode flags and gives a TEV descriptor local a semantic name.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/it/itmaterial.c added 14 deleted 14 hunks 4
pr_body: Use rendermode flags
diff: 0x04000000, 0x1000, 0x60000000, 0x20000000 replaced with RENDER_SHADOW, RENDER_TOON, RENDER_BLENDING, RENDER_NO_ZUPDATE
diff: local HSD_TevDesc sp14 renamed to desc

what_changed: In grmaterial.c, grMaterial_MObjInfo now names the previously padded region as HSD_TevDesc tevdesc_tmpl and HSD_TECnst texp_tmpl.
The zero-initialized grMaterial_803E0A20 object was replaced with an explicit initializer containing class info, TEV descriptor template values, and TExp constant template values.
The prior data hack using grMaterial_804D4560, grMaterial_804D4568, and data_section_pad was removed; hsdInitClassInfo now uses inline string literals.
Generated-looking raw assert blocks were converted to HSD_ASSERT, and OSReport string references were restored to inline string literals.
grMaterial_804D456C was moved lower in grmaterial.c, matching the PR body claim about sdata ordering.
grmaterial.h removed static/internal declarations from the header and changed grMaterial_801C8CDC from UNK_RET to void.
itmaterial.c replaced raw rendermode bit masks with named render flags and renamed a stack TEV descriptor local from sp14 to desc.
smart_moves: The PR removes a data-section padding workaround by recovering the real template fields in grMaterial_MObjInfo instead of keeping anonymous bytes and extra string/data symbols.
It keeps ordinary strings inline for library names, assert messages, and OSReport messages instead of retaining address-derived string globals.
It updates header declarations while cleaning the implementation, keeping prototype surfaces closer to the recovered function bodies.
It improves render flag readability by using existing named RENDER_* constants for item material behavior.
It limits the local variable rename in itmaterial.c to a proven role: the stack object is a TEV descriptor, so desc is more meaningful than sp14.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a struct padding block is only preserving data layout, check whether adjacent code and sibling structs reveal real typed fields before keeping the padding as source style.
evidence_refs: diff: u8 pad_x50[0xDC - 0x50] and char library_name[0xF4 - 0xDC] replaced with HSD_TevDesc tevdesc_tmpl and HSD_TECnst texp_tmpl

decomp_lessons.lesson: Generated assert/report blocks using string-address globals can often be restored to HSD_ASSERT plus inline OSReport strings when the line numbers and messages are visible.
evidence_refs: diff: __assert(base + 0xF4, 0xF3, base + 0x104) became HSD_ASSERT(0xF3, mobj->tevdesc)
diff: OSReport(base + 0x114) became OSReport("can't find free color register!\n")
diff: OSReport(base + 0x138) became OSReport("can't find free alpha register!\n")

decomp_lessons.lesson: If named render-mode flags exist, prefer them over raw bit constants for material setup branches and flag updates.
evidence_refs: diff: rendermode checks and updates changed from raw constants to RENDER_SHADOW, RENDER_TOON, RENDER_BLENDING, and RENDER_NO_ZUPDATE
pr_body: Use rendermode flags

decomp_lessons.lesson: Header cleanup should remove static/internal implementation declarations and replace UNK_RET once the body proves the signature.
evidence_refs: diff: static implementation-only prototypes removed from grmaterial.h
diff: grMaterial_801C8CDC changed from UNK_RET to void

naming_conventions.convention: Use named RENDER_* flags instead of raw rendermode masks where the flag meaning is already defined.
evidence_refs: diff: itmaterial.c rendermode mask replacements

naming_conventions.convention: Rename stack-address locals to short semantic role names once the type/role is clear.
evidence_refs: diff: it_80277F90 local variable rename

naming_conventions.convention: Keep ordinary source string literals inline instead of naming address-derived globals when no ownership evidence is shown.
evidence_refs: diff: grMaterial_804D4560 and grMaterial_804D4568 removed; inline strings used at callsites

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recover typed data fields and explicit initializers to remove padding and data-order hacks.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Remove grmaterial data hack
diff: grMaterial_MObjInfo padding replaced by tevdesc_tmpl and texp_tmpl
diff: data_section_pad removed
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The PR evidence shows the cleanup but does not include objdiff details explaining how the initializer affects every relocation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: For sdata ordering, move the small ItCmd array to the later source location instead of anchoring order with dummy padding.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Fix grmaterial sdata ordering
diff: grMaterial_804D456C removed near top-level data and re-added near fn_801C9664
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is grounded in the diff and PR body; no broader rule about all ItCmd placement is proven.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Restore macro forms for asserts while preserving explicit OSReport side effects.
evidence_refs: diff: OSReport calls remain before HSD_ASSERT in register-allocation failure branches
diff: raw __assert calls replaced with HSD_ASSERT
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Matches loaded standards for assert/report macro cleanup.

follow_up_queries: Find other material files using raw rendermode constants instead of RENDER_* flags.
Search for data_section_pad or anonymous padding used only to force data/sdata order.
Search for __assert plus OSReport patterns in material or rendering code that can become HSD_ASSERT while preserving report side effects.
Search headers for static function prototypes or UNK_RET declarations that conflict with recovered source bodies.
Search for address-derived string globals used only for assert/report text or ordinary library/resource names.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that moving every ItCmd table near its consumers is a global rule; this PR only supports grMaterial_804D456C placement for grmaterial sdata ordering.
Do not treat the explicit grMaterial_803E0A20 initializer as a universal initializer style for all HSD_MObjInfo-like classes without local evidence.
Do not infer reviewer intent; no human review comments were loaded.
